scripts.package: node build.js && node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'),{readFileSync}=require('fs'),v=JSON.parse(readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).version;execSync('powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist\\* -DestinationPath squideo-crm-'+v+'.zip -Force');console.log('Packaged squideo-crm-'+v+'.zip');"
